title: MIDAS ValueData
description: A single time-series interval with a price or emissions value.

ValueName.description: Description of the interval (e.g. 'summer on peak', 'winter off peak').

DateStart.description: Date of interval start in UTC (ISO 8601).

DateEnd.description: Date of interval end in UTC (ISO 8601).

DayStart.description: Day type of interval start in local time (human-readable string in GET responses), or null (observed in HistoricalData).

DayEnd.description: Day type of interval end in local time (human-readable string in GET responses), or null (observed in HistoricalData).

TimeStart.description: Time of interval start in UTC. Usually HH:MM:SS but Flex Alert responses use HH:MM.

TimeEnd.description: Time of interval end in UTC. Usually HH:MM:SS but Flex Alert responses use HH:MM.

value.description: The price or emissions value for this interval. Note: lowercase in GET responses despite upstream docs showing uppercase 'Value'.
